name: Eternal Link
short_description: An epic medieval fantasy adventure with exploration and action.
detailed_description:
ABOUT THE GAME:

  • Medieval fantasy single-player game;
  • Simple and straightforward real-time combat;
  • 10 playable characters available;
  • World Map with various stages and exploration;
  • Steam Achievements;
  • Find treasures that will aid your journey;
  • Acquire new equipment/weapons/hearts to become stronger;
  • Solve small puzzles;
  • Defeat challenging bosses;
  • Discover the epic story of Eternal Link!

Indie game developed by one person.

ATTENTION! By default, the game is in Brazilian Portuguese; on the title screen, go to options to change the language you wish to play in.

Enjoy the game!

(C) REFMAP / Degica, Co. LTD
(C) Bittersweet Entertainment / Degica, Co. LTD

=====================================

In a kingdom on the brink of extinction, the 10 Horsemen of the Apocalypse emerge as the last guardians of hope, summoned by a desperate king. Helping the king free a fearless fairy is just the beginning of an epic tale! Players will be immersed in a saga of mysterious magic, lands to explore, overwhelming challenges, and dramas that thunder in the hearts of the brave. Ready to lead a member of the Horsemen of the Apocalypse and embark on this overwhelming grand journey?

=====================================
